English.string:
Grants each of Hindsight, Foresight, and
Sight Beyond Sight, in sequence
Hindsight lasts for a {0} second duration

Foresight prevents Dodge Roll from Avoiding [HitDamage|Hits] and lasts until immediately before you are [HitDamage|Hit] while Dodge Rolling
Sight Beyond Sight makes you unable to die and lasts for a {0} second duration
Fully recover Life when you gain Sight Beyond Sight
